author: Haroen Viaene
subject: fix(composition): forwards parameters in sffv (#6889)
body:
* fix(composition): forwards parameters in sffv

in https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/pull/6792/changes#diff-6af3d106c335b51f0e85d49f808b248a9704cb12dab1472606b6e9a383d981b1 we removed these lines as we assumed they didn't change anything meaningful. We however are using this because mainHelper is aliased with composition search for facet values in https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch/blob/59f8fbf1a70262ab0927f5fdcde5c3ecbd10e3ba/packages/instantsearch.js/src/lib/InstantSearch.ts#L580-L583

* add missing type

* test
